evaluation_scope: AEM-EVOLVE governance classification outputs — controlled environment — EthicBit / CEMU v3.7.0+
evaluation_methodology: Structural parity evaluation of governance gate outcomes across equivalent input classes. Outcome consistency verified across operator identities and artifact types.
protected_attributes_evaluated: operator_identity — governance gate outcomes are operator-identity-invariant within authorized scope
artifact_type — gate acceptance criteria apply uniformly across all 23 declared artifact types
request_timestamp — temporal fairness: same evidence yields same outcome regardless of submission time
evaluation_dataset_scope: AEM-EVOLVE v2.0 evidence baseline — 140 checks across 14 gates

metrics_and_thresholds.operator_invariance: PASS — gate logic does not branch on operator identity
metrics_and_thresholds.artifact_type_parity: PASS — all 23 artifact types evaluated under uniform acceptance criteria

findings: No differential treatment observed across protected attributes within declared scope.
known_limitations: Evaluation scope is limited to the AEM-EVOLVE governance API — not a general AI system fairness evaluation
Protected attribute scope is structural, not demographic
